SEARCH
Package model.venues

Class Venue

java.lang.Object
model.venues.Venue
Direct Known Subclasses:
Arena, Auditorium, OpenAir, Stadium
public abstract class Venue extends Object
Abstract base class representing a generic venue in the TicketMiner system. Stores capacity, cost, and seating section percentage information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Venue()
    Constructs a default Venue with no initial field values.
    Venue(int venueID, String name, String type, int capacity, int concertCapacity, double cost, int vipPercent, int goldPercent, int silverPercent, int bronzePercent, int generalAdmissionPercent, int reservedPercent)
    Constructs a Venue with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getBronzePercent()
    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section.
    int
    getCapacity()
    Returns the general seating capacity of this venue.

    getConcertCapacity()
    Returns the concert-specific seating capacity of this venue.

    getCost()
    Returns the rental cost for this venue.

    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.
    int
    getGoldPercent()
    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section.
    String
    getName()
    Returns the name of this venue.
    int
    getReservedPercent()
    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
    int
    getSilverPercent()
    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section.
    String
    getType()
    Returns the type of this venue (e.g., Arena, Stadium, Open Air, Auditorium).

    getVenueID()
    Returns the unique identifier for this venue.
    int
    getVipPercent()
    Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.

    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section.
    void

    Sets the general seating capacity of this venue.
    void

    Sets the concert-specific seating capacity of this venue.
    void
    setCost(double cost)
    Sets the rental cost for this venue.
    void
    setGeneralAdmissionPercent(int generalAdmissionPercent)
    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.
    void
    setGoldPercent(int goldPercent)
    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section.
    void
    setName(String name)
    Sets the name of this venue.
    void
    setReservedPercent(int reservedPercent)
    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
    void
    setSilverPercent(int silverPercent)
    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section.
    void
    setType(String type)
    Sets the type of this venue.
    void
    setVipPercent(int vipPercent)
    Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a formatted string representation of this venue including ID, name, type, capacities, cost, and all seating section percentages.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Venue

      public Venue()
      Constructs a default Venue with no initial field values.

    • Venue

      public Venue(int venueID, String name, String type, int capacity, int concertCapacity, double cost, int vipPercent, int goldPercent, int silverPercent, int bronzePercent, int generalAdmissionPercent, int reservedPercent)
      Constructs a Venue with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.
      Parameters:
      venueID - the unique numeric identifier for the venue
      name - the name of the venue
      type - the venue type (e.g., Arena, Stadium, Open Air, Auditorium)
      capacity - the general seating capacity of the venue
      concertCapacity - the concert-specific seating capacity
      cost - the rental cost of the venue
      vipPercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section
      goldPercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section
      silverPercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section
      bronzePercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section
      generalAdmissionPercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section
      reservedPercent - the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section

  • Method Details

    • getVenueID

      public int getVenueID()
      Returns the unique identifier for this venue.
      Returns:
      the venue ID

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of this venue.
      Returns:
      the venue name

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the type of this venue (e.g., Arena, Stadium, Open Air, Auditorium).
      Returns:
      the venue type string

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns the general seating capacity of this venue.
      Returns:
      the total capacity

    • getConcertCapacity

      public int getConcertCapacity()
      Returns the concert-specific seating capacity of this venue.
      Returns:
      the concert capacity

    • getCost

      public double getCost()
      Returns the rental cost for this venue.
      Returns:
      the cost to rent the venue

    • getVipPercent

      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.

      the VIP seat percentage

      public int getGoldPercent()
      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section.
      Returns:
      the Gold seat percentage

      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section.
      Returns:

      public int getBronzePercent()
      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section.
      Returns:
      the Bronze seat percentage

      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.
      Returns:
      the General Admission seat percentage

    • getReservedPercent

      public int getReservedPercent()
      Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
      Returns:
      the Reserved seat percentage

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of this venue.
      Parameters:
      name - the new venue name

      Sets the rental cost for this venue.
      Parameters:
      cost - the new rental cost

      Sets the general seating capacity of this venue.
      Parameters:

      Sets the type of this venue.

      Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.

      Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.

    • setReservedPercent

      public void setReservedPercent(int reservedPercent)
      Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
      Parameters:
      reservedPercent - the new Reserved seat percentage

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of this venue including ID, name, type, capacities, cost, and all seating section percentages.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a readable summary of the venue
